justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted "in the coming week some moment" as until June 7th, when the conversation started on June 7th, but later correctly understood and searched for specific dates and times.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability without offering suitable alternatives or proactively expanding the search in a way that would lead to a booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls and repeatedly stated that no appointments were available without offering new, viable options, leading to an unnecessarily long conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to find any appointments across multiple attempts and contact methods, leading to a prolonged and unproductive interaction.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent's recovery was poor as it consistently reported unavailability and offered the same limited set of options (check further out, different medium, different time of day) without successfully finding a slot or adapting its strategy effectively.

overall_notes: The agent struggled significantly with finding any available appointments, leading to a very frustrating experience for the user who had to repeatedly suggest new dates and times, only to be met with constant unavailability.
